headline: Mastercard Targets AI Agent Commerce With New Machine Payment Network
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) has launched Agent Pay for Machines, an AI-powered payments network designed for autonomous, high-frequency transactions. The new platform supports stablecoin settlement and multi-rail payment flows, aiming to connect different providers and systems. Agent Pay for Machines is built to handle AI-to-AI and machine-to-machine payments with permissioning and control features for participating businesses. For a company already known for its global card and payment network,...
